common.error_electron_required: Please run in the Electron desktop environment
common.error_db_connect: Failed to connect to local database. Please run inside the Electron desktop app, not a normal browser!
common.db_error_hint:
Unknown error
Please make sure to completely restart the app to apply the latest database patches!

dashboard.greeting: Good morning. Start the day with a clear workspace.
dashboard.intro: The dashboard displays summaries and provides quick shortcuts into all modules.
dashboard.no_tasks: No tasks for today. Enjoy your day!
dashboard.no_books: No current reading book. Import one now!
dashboard.empty_notebook: Notebook is empty. Write your first word!
dashboard.no_videos: No videos collected. Click to manage.
dashboard.bind_task_hint: Bind today's core task to start focus

tasks.title: Task Manager
tasks.subtitle: Plan, move, and review your work in one clear workspace.
tasks.instance_panel_desc: Generated tasks you can move, finish, and review.
tasks.template_library_description: Manage reusable task structures and execution steps.
tasks.delete_template_description: Deleting a template does not affect existing tasks.
tasks.board_empty_description: After you create a task, it will appear in the board according to its current status.
tasks.recurring_task_hint: Configure the recurrence rule and execution times below
tasks.delete_scope_single_description: Only this task is removed, and it will not reappear on the calendar.
tasks.delete_scope_end_repeat_title: Delete this occurrence and end repeats
tasks.delete_scope_end_repeat_description: The current task and later unfinished occurrences are removed. Completed history is kept.
tasks.delete_scope_delete_repeat_title: Delete the repeat plan and unfinished tasks
tasks.delete_scope_delete_repeat_description: All unfinished occurrences are removed. Completed history is kept.
tasks.prompt_delete_task_confirm: Delete this task and its subtasks?
tasks.prompt_cancel_repeat_confirm: Cancel future repeats? Existing tasks will be kept.
tasks.toast_repeat_deleted: Repeat plan and unfinished tasks deleted
tasks.quick_add_placeholder: Add task, enter to submit (use #tag for tags)
tasks.confirm_complete_with_subtasks_descripti: "{{title}}" and all of its subtasks will be marked as complete.
tasks.confirm_close_overdue_description: "{{title}}" will be closed and marked as complete.
tasks.confirm_close_overdue_with_subtasks_desc: "{{title}}" and all of its subtasks will be closed and marked as complete.
tasks.template_study_sub_3: Sync highlights & notes to Notes module
tasks.toast_template_created: Task template created. An instance will be generated when its start time is due.
tasks.prompt_delete_rule_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this recurring rule?
tasks.toast_template_imported: Successfully imported a set of tasks from template!
tasks.simple_repeat_hint: This uses simple repeat settings. You can configure intervals, days, dates, and multiple times.
tasks.select_task_tip: Select a task to view details
tasks.details_empty_description: Choose a task on the left, or create a new one to get started.
tasks.calendar_empty_title: No tasks are due in this date range
tasks.calendar_empty_description: Tasks will appear here after you assign them a due date.
tasks.rules_empty_description: Create a rule to generate tasks automatically on your chosen schedule.
tasks.legacy_cron_warning: This is a legacy Cron rule. Direct editing is no longer supported; create a visual recurrence rule instead.
tasks.legacy_cron_save_blocked: Legacy Cron rules cannot be saved directly. Use a visual recurrence rule instead.
tasks.multiple_times_hint: Add multiple times to create a separate execution item for each one.
tasks.month_days_hint: Use -1 for the last day of each month.
tasks.scheduled_log_desc: This view shows saved recurring rules for the current user instead of simulated run records.
tasks.scheduled_log_empty: No recurring rules have been saved yet.

notes.title: Notes
notes.subtitle: Multi-format Markdown writing and PKM database.
notes.prompt_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
notes.no_note_selected: Select or create a note to start
notes.empty_state_description: Choose a note from the sidebar, or create a new note to start writing.
notes.toast_navigating_shelf: Navigating to Shelf - Book ID: {{bookId}} Chapter: {{chapter}}
notes.select_note_tip: Select or create a note to begin
notes.notebook_category_help: Choose an existing category or type a new category name.
notes.toast_notebook_exists: Failed to create/rename notebook, name might exist
notes.prompt_delete_notebook_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the notebook "{{name}}"? Notes will not be deleted, they will be moved to "Uncategorized".
notes.prompt_discard_changes: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
notes.error_reserved_notebook_name: That name is reserved for a system entry. Choose another name.
notes.error_notebook_unavailable: This notebook is no longer available. Refresh and try again.

books.title: Books
books.shelf_name_duplicate: A shelf with this name already exists
books.toast_category_create_failed: Could not create the shelf. Please try again.
books.toast_category_update_failed: Could not update the shelf. Please try again.
books.toast_category_delete_failed: Could not delete the shelf. Please try again.
books.confirm_delete_shelf_desc: Delete the shelf “{{name}}”? Its {{count}} books will not be deleted and will move to “To Organize”.
books.subtitle: E-book reading, highlights, and annotations.
books.delete_book_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the book "{{name}}"? This action is irreversible, and will delete the local file and all associated highlights and annotations.
books.unsupported_reader_desc: The {{format}} format is currently supported via your system's default application.
books.chapter_2: Chapter 2: SQLite Database Design and Optimization
books.chapter_3: Chapter 3: Secure Communication between Main and Renderer
books.chapter_4: Chapter 4: Offline Sync and Bidirectional Linking
books.prompt_add_category: Please enter new book category name:
books.toast_note_updated: Reading notes incrementally synced to Notes module!
books.toast_note_synced: Reading notes synced to Notes module successfully!
books.mock_p1: With Offline-First as a core constraint, all user tasks, notes, and reading states remain fully functional and responsive even with no network connection.
books.mock_p2: Local-First does not mean zero cloud services, but that the user completely owns and controls all data.
books.toast_file_picker_unavailable: File selection is only available in the desktop app
books.empty_shelf: No books in this category. Click "Import Book" to add local EPUB/PDFs.
books.mock_p3: By storing all user assets locally in an SQLite database, the application can boot instantly and remain fully operational without internet.
books.toast_category_deleted: Shelf deleted. Its books moved to “To Organize”.
books.confirm_delete_category_desc: Are you sure you want to delete category "{{name}}"? All books under this category will be automatically moved to "Uncategorized". No books will be deleted.

videos.title: Videos
videos.group_name_duplicate: A sibling group with this name already exists
videos.group_translation_duplicate: A sibling group already uses this {{language}} name
videos.group_create_failed: Could not create the group. Please try again.
videos.group_update_failed: Could not update the group. Please try again.
videos.group_delete_failed: Could not delete the group. Please try again.
videos.confirm_delete_group_body: Delete “{{name}}”? Its {{videoCount}} directly assigned videos will not be deleted and will move to “To Organize”. Its {{childCount}} direct child groups will move up one level.
videos.group_unavailable: This group is no longer available. Refresh and try again.
videos.toast_group_saved_refresh_failed: The group was saved, but the list could not be refreshed: {{error}}
videos.subtitle: Online video collection and offline playback library.
videos.subtitle_mock_1: In this chapter, we will discuss Electron IPC.
videos.subtitle_mock_2: In this chapter, we will discuss Electron IPC.
videos.subtitle_mock_3: In this chapter, we will discuss Electron IPC.
videos.subtitle_mock_4: The main process (ipcMain) and renderer process (ipcRenderer) connect properly.
videos.toast_select_at_least_one: Please select at least one video to download
videos.toast_videos_added_to_list: Added {{count}} videos to the video list
videos.toast_video_added: Video added to background download queue
videos.toast_bilibili_cookie_required: Sign in to Bilibili or configure cookies in Download Settings before downloading.
videos.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this video record?
videos.toast_video_deleted: Are you sure you want to delete this video record?
videos.input_url_placeholder: Paste video URL to parse and download (supports YouTube, Bilibili lists or episodes)
videos.download_settings_hint: Configure download tools, folder, quality, and Bilibili login access
videos.douyin_login_required: Sign in to Douyin in Download Settings first.
videos.douyin_login_hint: After signing in from Download Settings, sync favorite folders and videos to this device.
videos.douyin_empty: No favorite folders have been synchronized yet. Sign in, then sync favorites.
videos.douyin_empty_folder: No visible videos in this favorite folder.
videos.bulk_download_skipped: Skipped {{count}} videos that do not need download
videos.bulk_no_download_needed: All selected videos are already downloaded
videos.bulk_no_downloadable_selected: No selected videos can be downloaded
videos.empty_library_tip: Video list is empty. Enter a URL above to parse and download.
videos.video_engine_ready_hint: Downloads are available after loading; URL parsing remains available.
videos.toast_video_engine_loading: The download plugin is loading. Please try again shortly.
videos.parse_result_title: Parse Result - Please select episodes to download
videos.playlist_title_placeholder: Used as the prefix for each part title
videos.confirm_delete_group: Delete group “{{name}}”? Videos in this group will become uncategorized.
videos.details_readonly_downloading: This video is downloading. Details are read-only for now.
videos.details_readonly_invalid: This video is invalid. You can only view details or delete it.
videos.toast_missing_download_source: This video has no download URL and cannot be added to the download queue.
videos.toast_playback_failed: Unable to open this video file.
videos.empty_details_tip: Select a video to edit group, tags, and diagnostics.

toolbox.title: Toolbox
toolbox.subtitle: Sandboxed internal utilities and external link lists.
toolbox.toast_focus_ended: Focus session ended, please take a break!
toolbox.toast_focus_accumulated: Focus time accumulated into task progress successfully!
toolbox.toast_vault_migrated: {{count}} legacy credentials migrated and the password vault is unlocked
toolbox.confirm_delete_credential: Are you sure you want to delete this credential?
toolbox.toast_password_copied: Password copied to clipboard. It will clear automatically in 30 seconds!
toolbox.pomo_integration_desc: Record this focus session toward the selected task.
toolbox.converter_offline_hint: Local example rate; this is not real-time data.
toolbox.vault_setup_desc: Set a master password with at least 8 characters. It is never stored, and encrypted records cannot be recovered if it is forgotten.
toolbox.vault_locked_desc: Enter the master password before viewing or managing saved credentials.
toolbox.vault_migration_required_desc: Legacy plaintext or simulated-encryption records were detected. Migration creates a sensitive local backup first, then encrypts old records with the new master password.
toolbox.vault_failed_desc: Vault metadata or encrypted data failed validation. Check backups or recovery before continuing.
toolbox.vault_unsupported_desc: This app cannot open the current vault version. Upgrade the app or use the matching version to continue.
toolbox.vault_error_generic: Vault operation failed. Please try again.
toolbox.vault_error_invalid_password: Incorrect master password. Please try again.
toolbox.vault_error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
toolbox.vault_error_password_mismatch: The two master passwords do not match.
toolbox.vault_empty_tip: No credentials recorded. Create your first one on the right.

aiChat.title: AI Chat
aiChat.subtitle: Connect providers and use text, image, and video models directly.
aiChat.settings_description: Manage model providers, available models, and local media data.
aiChat.load_error_desc: The failure did not affect other Toolbox features. Reload the module to try again.
aiChat.config_error_desc: Check the local database and secure credential service, then reload.
aiChat.empty_title: Connect your models and tools to one local conversation workspace.
aiChat.empty_desc: Add a model provider first, then create an agent. MCP tools can be connected later. API keys remain inside secure Electron main-process storage.

onboarding.hero_desc: Providers supply capabilities, agents define behavior, and MCP supplies tools. Each layer can be configured, tested, and disabled independently while credentials remain in secure main-process storage.
onboarding.architecture_title: Three configuration layers, each kept clear.
onboarding.architecture_desc: Verify the provider connection, define the agent's models and behavior, then add tools only when needed. No layer is locked to another.
onboarding.boundary_title: Credentials stay out of the page and standard backups.
onboarding.boundary_desc: API keys and sensitive headers live in Electron secure storage. Chats, media, and run history retain only traceable local references.
onboarding.provider_short: Connect text, image, and video capabilities.
onboarding.mcp_short: Expose external capabilities through risk policies.
onboarding.desire_title: Only the necessary steps stand between a connection and your first conversation.
onboarding.desire_desc: Once the first provider is ready, onboarding exits automatically into the everyday workspace and does not block future conversations.
onboarding.stack_provider_desc: Enter the compatible protocol, endpoint, models, and credentials. Test the connection before assigning capabilities to an agent.
onboarding.stack_agent_desc: Choose default models, context limits, and tool approval rules so every run has a consistent, auditable boundary.
onboarding.stack_mcp_desc: MCP is not required to begin chatting. Enable it later and keep confirmation for writes, commands, and sensitive operations.
onboarding.action_title: Connect one model and start today.
onboarding.action_desc: After the first provider saves, the app returns to the conversation workspace. Agents and MCP can be configured progressively.
onboarding.footer: Local conversations · Secure credentials · Recoverable media · Auditable tools

aiChat.panel_chat_desc: Conversation history, streaming messages, and the run inspector will arrive in the next atomic tasks.
aiChat.panel_providers_desc: Manage text, image, and video models, connection health, and capability defaults.
aiChat.panel_agents_desc: Combine system prompts, models, context, and available tools.
aiChat.panel_mcp_desc: Configure remote or local MCP servers and manage tool permissions.

chat.no_conversations: No conversations yet. Create one or start typing on the right.
chat.delete_dialog_desc: Delete “{{name}}”? Its saved text history will be permanently removed.
chat.delete_media_option: Also delete local media not referenced by other conversations
chat.delete_media_option_desc: Leave this off to preserve media files for later cleanup in Media & Storage.
chat.start_desc: Choose a model, then send the first message.
chat.exported: Conversation exported as a Markdown file
chat.export_failed: Unable to export the complete conversation
chat.welcome_title: Give your ideas a controlled, traceable AI workspace.
chat.welcome_desc: Conversation history stays local. Model requests leave from the main process, so this page never receives API keys.
chat.suggestion_one: Identify today's three most important tasks
chat.suggestion_two: Turn a rough idea into an execution plan
chat.suggestion_three: Review content and highlight its risks
chat.empty_conversation_desc: {{model}} is ready for your first message.
chat.no_agent_desc: An Agent binds a text model, system prompt, and context policy. Once ready, it can stream conversations here.
chat.setup_provider_title: Connect a model to start chatting
chat.setup_provider_desc: Add a provider and register at least one text model to start chatting.
chat.setup_model_desc: The provider is connected. Register a model ID in Model Management to begin chatting.
chat.setup_composer_placeholder: Configure a model to start typing
chat.composer_placeholder: Type a message and press Enter to send
chat.composer_hint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line
chat.stop_failed: Unable to stop the current run
chat.privacy_note: Provider credentials and custom authentication headers remain inside the Electron main process.

tools.approval_desc: Review the tool, risk, and arguments. Credentials are never shown here and cannot be changed by the model.

images.composer_placeholder: Describe the image you want to generate
images.composer_hint: Describe an image and press Enter to generate
images.provider_required: The current Agent has no image provider
images.provider_required_action: The current Agent has no image model. Bind an image provider in Agent management.
images.feature_unavailable: Image generation is not enabled in this environment.

videos.composer_placeholder: Describe the video you want to generate
videos.composer_hint: Describe a video and press Enter to generate
videos.provider_required: The current Agent has no video provider
videos.provider_required_action: The current Agent has no video model. Bind a video provider in Agent management.
videos.feature_unavailable: Video generation is not enabled in this environment.
videos.generating: Generating, downloading, and processing the video

storage.load_failed: Unable to read AI storage usage
storage.hero_title_after: every media result a clear boundary.
storage.hero_desc: Review local AI usage, preserve recoverable tasks, and inspect conversation, media, and file impact before deletion. API keys are excluded from standard backups.
storage.locations_desc: AI conversations, generated media, and encrypted credentials are stored separately for the current user. Use these paths when checking backups or troubleshooting.
storage.auto_cleanup: When over limit, automatically remove unreferenced media only
storage.policy_save_failed: Could not save the capacity policy. Try again.
storage.type_detail: Registered asset usage grouped by media type.
storage.cleanup_desc: Cleanup plans recalculate references and active tasks. If storage changes, the old plan expires and must be reviewed again.
storage.preview_failed: Unable to create a cleanup preview
storage.preview_empty: Choose a cleanup scope and preview its impact. Previewing does not delete data.
storage.active_block: Active tasks are present. Stop generation before cleaning storage.
storage.confirm_cleanup: This will delete {{count}} media assets and recover about {{bytes}}. Continue?
storage.cleanup_failed: AI storage cleanup failed. Refresh and preview again.

models.sync_failed: The model was saved, but its internal runtime profile could not be synchronized
models.default_failed: Unable to set the default model
models.catalog_desc: Register text, image, and video models here. Provider settings then choose their available models and a default for each capability.
models.category_placeholder: For example chatgpt, claude, or gemini
models.empty_desc: Add a model or clear the current search and capability filter.
models.delete_confirm: Remove model “{{model}}”? If it is still selected by a provider, remove that selection in Provider Settings first.
models.capability_hint: Select every capability this model supports. It will then appear in each matching provider model list.
models.model_placeholder: For example gpt-4.1, grok-2-image, or a video model ID
models.form_kicker: Create or update a catalog entry
models.form_title: Give the model a stable identifier.
models.form_hint: Models are not bound to providers. You can select one in one or more providers afterwards.

providers.save_failed: Unable to save the model provider
providers.delete_confirm: Delete model provider “{{name}}”? Its linked model profiles will be removed, while the global model catalog and conversation history remain.
providers.empty_desc: Add API endpoints and credentials for text, image, or video models. Sensitive values are written only to secure system storage.
providers.custom_text_model_placeholder: Enter a model ID not in the list
providers.model_catalog_hint: Select one or more models registered in Model Management.
providers.model_catalog_empty: No models exist for this capability yet. Add one in Model Management first.
providers.request_body_hint: Add any provider-specific JSON parameters. The app safely supplies and overrides model, messages, stream, and tool-call fields.
providers.name: Provider name
providers.api_key_keep: Leave blank to keep the stored key
providers.headers_preserved: Stored headers: {{names}}. Values remain hidden and are never read into the page.
providers.agents_section_desc: An Agent is a reusable chat profile combining a default text model, instructions, and context. Select common Agents or enter a new name.
providers.agents_require_text: Enter a text model before adding assistants for this provider.
providers.custom_agents_label: Not listed? Add a new one
providers.agent_general_desc: Everyday questions, planning, and information organization.
providers.agent_writing_desc: Improve structure, expression, tone, and accuracy.
providers.agent_research_desc: Separate evidence from inference, compare options, and flag uncertainty.
providers.agent_coding_desc: Diagnose code, implement changes, and check regressions.
providers.agents_create_failed: The provider was saved, but {{count}} assistants could not be created. Edit the provider and try again.

agents.delete_confirm: Delete agent “{{name}}”? A default agent needs a ready replacement first.
agents.manager_intro: An Agent is not another model. It is a reusable chat profile that chooses a model, supplies instructions, and controls how much context is retained.
agents.empty_desc: Create an agent that combines a system prompt, model providers, and optional MCP tools.
agents.provider_required: Add a provider with a text model before creating a runnable agent.
agents.no_results: No agents match the current search.
agents.name: Agent name
agents.allow_all_warning: Auto-running every tool skips high-risk confirmations. Use it only with trusted MCP servers in an isolated environment.
agents.no_mcp: No MCP servers are configured. The agent can still run as a model-only conversation.
agents.tools_placeholder: One qualified tool name per line, or separate names with commas

mcp.explainer_desc: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is a standard that lets assistants discover and call local or remote tools you explicitly connect.
mcp.use_case_desc: An assistant must query business data, read files, call internal services, or run controlled local commands.
mcp.optional_desc: Questions, writing, and summaries only need a model. Leave MCP unconfigured without a clear tool requirement.
mcp.safety_desc: Credentials stay in the main process. Tools are discovered before access, and writes, commands, or external side effects follow risk-based confirmation.
mcp.save_failed: Unable to save the MCP server
mcp.disabled_toast: MCP server disabled and linked agents rechecked
mcp.delete_confirm: Delete MCP server “{{name}}”? Remove it from any agents first if it is currently in use.
mcp.delete_blocked_dependencies: Cannot delete this MCP server because these agents still use it: {{names}}.
mcp.disable_confirm_dependencies: Disabling this server will make these agents incomplete: {{names}}. Continue?
mcp.empty_desc: Ordinary chat still works. When a tool is genuinely needed, connect a remote Streamable HTTP, SSE, or local stdio server.
mcp.no_results: No MCP servers match the current filters.
mcp.test_pending: Real connection testing becomes available with the MCP runtime manager
mcp.connection_succeeded: MCP connection and tool discovery succeeded
mcp.name: Server name
mcp.arguments_placeholder: One argument per line; no shell parsing
mcp.credentials_preserved: Stored sensitive fields: {{names}}. Values remain hidden and are never read into the page.
mcp.stdio_warning: stdio launches the command entered by the user on this computer. Models cannot change this configuration, and risky tools remain governed by the agent approval policy.
mcp.assistant_access: Assistants allowed to use this connection
mcp.assistant_access_desc: Only selected assistants can discover and call these tools. Return here anytime to change access.
mcp.no_assistants: No assistants are available yet. Add one from Model Providers first.
mcp.saved_with_assistants: Tool connection saved and {{count}} assistants updated
mcp.assistant_link_failed: The tool connection was saved, but {{count}} assistants could not be updated. Edit it and try again.
mcp.no_risk_overrides: No tool risk overrides. Risk will be inferred from annotations and tool names.
mcp.risk_failed: Unable to update the tool risk rule

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage preferences, path migrations, and user profiles.
settings.prompt_add_category: Please enter new book category name:
settings.category_subtitle: Sort, modify, add or remove the categories outline on your bookshelf.
settings.account_switch_desc: You can create different user accounts locally, and the system will dynamically connect to independent user databases to achieve physical file data isolation.
settings.security_desc: Configure this secret key. When you later enable OneDrive / WebDAV cloud sync, the local database will be encrypted with AES before uploading to prevent cloud providers from inspecting your data.
settings.security_toast_key_configured: Local backup encryption key configured successfully
settings.security_migration_desc: Safely migrate your entire `~/LifeOS` directory containing databases, accounts, keys, ebooks, and video files to external drives or third-party sync folders (like iCloud Drive).
settings.backup_desc: Export the current user's tasks, notes, books, default videos, and required configuration as a ZIP package with a verification manifest. Sensitive legacy vault backups are excluded.
settings.backup_external_video_note: External video directories are recorded in manifest.json only and are not copied automatically.
settings.restore_desc: The backup version, paths, sizes, and checksums are validated before restoring into the current user directory. The app must restart after a successful restore.
settings.restore_validated: Backup verified: user {{userId}}, format v{{version}}, {{count}} files, source platform {{platform}}.
settings.restore_confirm: Restore {{count}} files to the current user "{{userId}}"? Current user data will be replaced, while sensitive recovery backups are preserved.
settings.restore_success: Restore complete. Restart the app to load the restored data.
settings.prompt_delete_category: Are you sure you want to delete category "{{name}}"? All books under this category will automatically change to "Uncategorized".
settings.toast_user_registered: New user {{id}} registered successfully and switched
settings.theme_desc: Change LifeOS theme style, takes effect instantly.
settings.security_title: End-to-End Encryption Key for Cloud Backups
settings.security_toast_migrated: Data directory migrated successfully. settings.json has been updated.
settings.security_clear_data_desc: Permanently delete all user databases, accounts, and imported files, but keep global configurations (like theme, language). This action is irreversible.
settings.security_clear_confirm_1: Are you sure you want to clear all app data? This will permanently delete all local accounts, tasks, notes, ebooks, and videos. This action cannot be undone.
settings.security_clear_confirm_2: Warning: All local user data will be permanently deleted! Global configurations (theme, language) will be preserved. Do you really want to proceed?
settings.security_clear_success: App data cleared successfully. System has been reset to its initial state.
settings.confirm_clear_password: Are you sure you want to clear the password protection for this account?
settings.account_switch_desc_secure: You will safely log out of your active workspace session. Database connections will be disconnected and locked.
settings.updates_subtitle: Check for updates, view version history, and download installer packages.
settings.updates_dev_mock_note: This is a simulated update flow in development and will not download or install a real version.
settings.updates_not_available: You are on the latest version.
settings.updates_download_failed: Failed to download update. You can manually download the installer from GitHub Releases.
settings.video_downloader_desc: Configure yt-dlp, ffmpeg, Bilibili authentication cookies, and download quality.
settings.video_download_dir_placeholder: Use the current user's video library folder by default
settings.video_bilibili_login_required: No Bilibili login has been saved
settings.video_bilibili_note_login: For Bilibili HD, member-only, or restricted videos, use “In-app Bilibili login” and scan the QR code first.
settings.video_bilibili_note_verify: Click “Verify cookie access” first to confirm the saved login can access the video.
settings.video_bilibili_note_412: If downloading fails with HTTP 412, Bilibili usually blocked anonymous access. Refresh the in-app login.
settings.video_bilibili_note_rights: Member videos can only be downloaded at qualities your current account is allowed to access.
settings.video_douyin_login_required: No Douyin login is saved. Sign in to sync favorites.
settings.video_ffmpeg_manual_install_note: Bundled ffmpeg installation is not available on this system. Install ffmpeg separately, then enter its full executable path above.

topbar.manage_dir_hint: Please manage local books/video directory in Settings

app.update_available_toast: New version {{version}} is available! Please go to Settings -> Updates to install.
app.create_task_cmd_desc: Press Enter to create this todo directly in DB
app.create_note_cmd_desc: Press Enter to create this note and open editor
app.search_placeholder: Search tasks, notes, books, videos, or type /task, /note command...

auth.subtitle_select: Please select an account to unlock your workspace
auth.guest_no_password: The selected account has no password configured. Unlock directly.
auth.err_fill_all: Please fill in all basic profile fields
auth.err_username_format: Username only allows alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens
auth.err_security_needed: A security question is required when setting a password
auth.err_answer_empty: Please provide an answer to your security question
auth.err_api_missing: API Connection missing. Please run in Electron client.
